subcodes.first_line: O ye young Baha'i children, ye seekers after true understanding and knowledge! A human being is distinguished from an animal in a number of ways.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نورسیده گان بهائیان و طالبان علم و عرفان انسان را امتیاز از حیوان بچند چیز
subcodes.subjects: @human reality created in the image of God, @education of children; moral education, @high station of learning, @excellence; distinction, @call to acquire knowledge; sciences, @man's distinction from the animal
